description: 11-ility prioritization compass that spends a numeric capacity budget supplied by <iron-triangle>. Outputs a quality vector with required rationales for every Critical pick.

attributes.name: data-bind-to
attributes.description: ID of a sibling <iron-triangle> to read capacity from

attributes.name: data-capacity-points
attributes.description: Literal capacity fallback when no triangle is bound

attributes.name: data-cost-weights
attributes.description: JSON object overriding default per-ility cost weights

attributes.name: data-min-rationale
attributes.description: Min characters for a Critical row's rationale

attributes.name: data-max-rationale
attributes.description: Max characters for the rationale textarea

slots.name: title
slots.description: Heading text shown above the rows

slots.name: (default)
slots.description: <fieldset> rows; omit to get the default 11 ilities

slots.name: overrun-rationale
slots.description: Pre-existing <textarea name="overrunRationale">; one is created when missing

events.name: nfr-compass:change
events.detail: { vector, rationales, costWeights, capacityPoints, criticalSum, overrunRationale, source }

events.name: nfr-compass:over-budget
events.description: The selection just crossed into over-budget

events.name: nfr-compass:under-budget
events.description: The selection just returned within budget
